meta.siteDescription: A quick harm-reduction guide to common drug combinations, based on TripSit information.
meta.landingDescription: Clear, multilingual harm-reduction cards that make trusted substance information easier to read, share, and use.

layout.previewBody1: This is a development version of psy.cards and is not meant for wide distribution just yet.
layout.previewBody2: None of the information on this site has been verified for accuracy. The site and its authors cannot be held liable for any inaccurate information.

landing.title: Clearer substance information, wherever people need it.
landing.lede: psy.cards turns trusted harm-reduction information into simple, multilingual cards for print, web, and social media.
landing.about: The goal is to make practical substance guidance easier to find, understand, translate, and share responsibly. Each card keeps the essentials close at hand, whether someone sees it in print, in a carousel post, or through a QR code.

footer.enabledBy: Enabled by the amazing work from

groupSummaries.stimulant: Racing heartbeat, sweating, energy, confidence, well-being, arousal, euphoria, lowered appetite, clenched jaws, dilated pupils, paranoia, anxiety, mood swings, impotence
groupSummaries.empathogen: Belonging, arousal, understanding, sweating, serotonin syndrome, erectile dysfunction, warmth, overheat, overdose, risk of dehydration or overhydration
groupSummaries.psychedelic: Visual disturbance, spiritual connection, loss of control, heightened senses, opened doors of perception, panic, mood swings, arousal, fear, vomiting, mental health harms
groupSummaries.dissociative: Euphoria, numb, safe, pain-free, floaty, relaxed, protected, happy, unaware, unconscious, in a 'hole', perceptual disturbances, scared, disconnected, vulnerable
groupSummaries.depressant: Relaxed, confident, care-free, risk-taking, unconscious, coma, euphoria, death, disinhibited behaviours, blackouts, sleep, vomiting, nausea, aggression, dependence
groupSummaries.opioid: Confident, pain-free, safe, sleepy, warm, feel invincible, itchy, constricted pupils, stop breathing, nausea, vomiting, euphoria, sweating, overdose, dependence, withdrawal
groupSummaries.cannabinoid: Calm, relaxed, chilled out, floaty, reduced pain, paranoia, anxiety, loss of memory, bloodshot eyes, increased sensuality, dry mouth, overexcited, changes to appetite

substanceCard.classFallback: This column represents a drug class rather than a single compound, so specific dose and duration data isn't available here.
substanceCard.missingDataFallback: Detailed substance data isn't available in the TripSit dataset for this entry. Combination data is still accurate.

timingChart.locationUnavailable: Location is not available in this browser.

cardContribute.communityNote: Substance and interaction data is contributed and maintained by the TripSit community.
cardContribute.chartIssuePrefix: Issues with the combo chart itself can be reported on

status.unknownDefinition: Interaction data is unavailable for this pair. Research further before combining.

burningMountain.title: ALPS Psycare — psy.cards
burningMountain.description: Burning Mountain harm-reduction combo chart with ALPS PsyCare resources for festival contexts.
burningMountain.intro: Science-based psychedelic education and non-judgmental psychological support at Swiss festivals. Ask PsyCare early if something feels off.
burningMountain.mapText: Use the map to find medical, security, PsyCare, and info points on site.
burningMountain.chartText: Quick reference for common festival substances. Talk to PsyCare or medical staff if something feels wrong.

emergency.label: Emergency
emergency.title: Need urgent help?
emergency.text: Find medical, security, or PsyCare nearby. In Switzerland call 144 or 112.

festival.label: Festival
festival.title: Festival info
festival.text: Tickets, camping, facilities, and travel details for Zernez.

saferUse.label: Safer use
saferUse.title: Drug checking
saferUse.text: Swiss checking services, alerts, and counselling from Saferparty.
